{% if config.description %} {% endif %} {% block head %}{% endblock %} {% set here = current_path %} {% set site = source.name | default(value="facet") %}
{# Project switcher — a dropdown so it scales as the ecosystem grows (fable, weavy, …). The trigger is the current project; the menu lists them all. data-x-site keeps the links site-absolute (mount-localization leaves them alone). #}
{{ site }}

facet ecosystem

{# Data-driven from the mounted sources (render.rs `sites`), so every subsite shows and the list grows as sources are added. #} {% for s in sites %} {{ s.name }} {% endfor %}
{% block breadcrumb %}{% endblock %}
{% block actions %}{% endblock %} {% set gh = "https://github.com/facet-rs/facet" if site == "facet" else "https://github.com/bearcove/" ~ site %}
{# Walk THIS source's own section tree (source.root), expanding the branch the current page lives in. #} {% if source is defined and source.root %} {{ source.root.title or site }} {% for sec in source.root.subsections | sort(attribute="weight") %}
{{ sec.title }} {% if here == sec.path or (sec.path ~ "/") in here %} {% set full = get_section(path=sec.path) %} {% if full and (full.pages or full.subsections) %}
    {% for p in full.pages | sort(attribute="weight") %}
  • {{ p.title }}
    • {% endfor %} {% for sub in full.subsections | sort(attribute="weight") %}
  • {{ sub.title }} {% if (sub.path ~ "/") in here %} {% set subfull = get_section(path=sub.path) %} {% if subfull and subfull.pages %}
      {% for p in subfull.pages | sort(attribute="weight") %}
    • {{ p.title }}
      • {% endfor %}
    {% endif %} {% endif %}
    • {% endfor %}
{% endif %} {% endif %}
{% endfor %} {% endif %}
{% block content %}{% endblock %}
{# On this page — the right-hand TOC. Pages and sections both expose `toc`. #} {# A page shows its OWN toc (never the parent section's); a section shows its toc. #} {% set toc = [] %} {% if page is defined and page %}{% set toc = page.toc | default(value=[]) %} {% elif section is defined and section %}{% set toc = section.toc | default(value=[]) %}{% endif %} {% if toc | length > 0 %}

On this page

    {% for h1 in toc %}{% if h1 %}
  • {% if h1.permalink %}{{ h1.title }}{% else %}{{ h1.title }}{% endif %} {% if h1.children %}
      {% for h2 in h1.children %}{% if h2 and h2.permalink %}
    • {{ h2.title }}
      • {% endif %}{% endfor %}
    {% endif %}
    • {% endif %}{% endfor %}
{% endif %}
facet ecosystem {{ site }} on GitHub Built with Dodeca
